# Savindu Thathsara

> AI & automation engineer based in London. Builds practical automation, AWS workflows, and modern web systems. Studying BSc (Hons) Computing with Artificial Intelligence at Northumbria University, London.

Website: https://savithathsara.me/
Canonical profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/savithathsara/
GitHub: https://github.com/BLSThathsara20
Email: blsthathsara@gmail.com
Location: London, United Kingdom
Experience: 7+ years (since 2019)

## Professional summary

Savindu Thathsara is a web developer and automation-focused engineer. He delivers React, Next.js, Vue, and WordPress systems, and works with AWS (EC2, S3, CloudFront, Route 53), CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Docker, and workflow automation. Open to AI and automation roles in the UK.

## Current role

- Sales & Marketing Executive — IT Operations & Automation at Asahi Motors London (Feb 2026 — present)
  Builds automation and web tools that improve dealership operations and reduce manual work.

## Recent experience

- Associate Lead — Web Development at Enfection (Apr 2025 — Dec 2025)
- Junior Lead — Web Development at Enfection (Apr 2024 — Apr 2025)
- Senior Executive — Web Development at Enfection (Mar 2023 — Apr 2024)
- Executive — Web Development at Enfection (Jun 2022 — Mar 2023)
- Web Developer at Owiro Holdings and HexaCode Solution (earlier roles)

## Education

- BSc (Hons) Computing with Artificial Intelligence Technology — Northumbria University, London (2026 — present)
- Higher National Diploma in Information Technology — SLIATE (2019 — 2022)

## Recognition

- Santander Career Support Award 2025–26 (Santander Universities UK)
- LSEG Code & Conquer 2024 — 1st Place
- NASA Space App Challenge — Global Nominee (2023)

## Core skills

- AI & automation: AI literacy, process automation, Python automation, workflow tools, prompt-driven tooling

- Web: React, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Tailwind CSS
- Platforms: WordPress, WooCommerce, GSAP, Figma to code
